qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: In a binary tree with nodes, every node has an odd number of descendants. Every node is considered to be its own descendant. What is the number of nodes in the tree that have exactly one child? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: We are given a set of distinct elements and an unlabeled binary tree with nodes. In how many ways can we populate the tree with the given set so that it becomes a binary search tree? A. B. C. D.
